title: Test with non-deterministic failures
description: Tests that pass/fail randomly due to race conditions or timing

mutation.description: Add race condition causing intermittent test failures

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect non-deterministic test behavior

title: Test mocking that hides real bugs
description: Over-mocking in tests prevents detection of actual implementation issues

mutation.description: Mock all dependencies hiding real bugs

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect inadequate test mocking

title: Integration test with environment dependencies
description: Tests that require specific environment setup fail in CI

mutation.description: Add test requiring unavailable environment resources

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect environment-dependent test failures

title: Test data that doesn't reflect production
description: Test data is too clean compared to real-world production data

mutation.description: Use sanitized test data missing edge cases

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect unrealistic test data

title: Performance test with unrealistic load
description: Performance tests use load patterns that don't match real usage

mutation.description: Use uniform load instead of realistic patterns

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect unrealistic performance test scenarios
